Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
116 
PRVDR_NPI_CNT 
LABEL: 
Provider NPI Count 
DESCRIPTION: The count of unique NPIs assigned to the provider. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_NPI_CNT 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_NPI_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
1–XX, or Null/missing 
COMMENT: 
This variable is the count of unique NPI values on the APR Identifier records for the
